message:
feat: add config loading from TOML and env vars

- Add LoadConfigFromTOML to parse TOML config data
- Add LoadConfigFromEnv to override config with environment variables
- Add LoadConfig to orchestrate loading from file and env
- Add TOML struct tags to Config type
- Add tests for all config loading functions

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
